# sqlx Offline Query Data
#
# This directory caches SQL query metadata for offline compilation.
# It is generated by:  cargo sqlx prepare
# And verified in CI by: cargo sqlx prepare --check
#
# CRITICAL: Do NOT delete this directory or its contents.
#           Commit changes after adding/modifying any sqlx query.
#
# see: https://github.com/launchbadge/sqlx/blob/main/sqlx-cli/README.md
